description: Emote name → emotional-category mapping for chat_features.py. Per ClippingResearch.md §Additional topic 4 + Song et al. 2021 (EPJ Data Science 10:43) — chat emote signatures are ~0.75 F1 on epic-moment detection, vision alone is ~0.70. Case-sensitive; matches exact chat tokens. Global Twitch + common BTTV/FFZ/7TV emotes. Per-channel subscriber emotes (e.g. {channel}Pog) can be added by editing this file directly — changes are picked up on next pipeline run.

laugh.description: Chat is laughing. Strongest single signal for comedy / awkward-moment clips.

hype.description: Celebration / excitement. Clutch plays, wins, hype moments.

tense.description: Tension / suspense. Close calls, about-to-die, near-wipe.

big_play.description: Big play / outplay / dominance. Gaming skill moments.

confusion.description: Confusion / disbelief / wat. Common on reveals + plot-twist payoffs.

phrase_patterns.description: Recurring chat phrases that are strong clip signals when bursting. Matched case-insensitively on full messages, not token-level.
